raw_consumer_statement:
am filing a complaint regarding a misapplied payment on my credit card account. 

On XX/XX/year>, I purchased XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX money orders in the amount of {$1000.00} each ( total {$2000.00} ) to pay toward my credit card balance. I have attached copies of the XXXX receipts and money order serial numbers as proof of purchase. 

On XX/XX/year>, the credit card company incorrectly processed XXXX of the {$1000.00} money orders as {$10000.00}. This was an internal processing error on their end. 

A correction was later made to reverse the {$10000.00} entry. However, after the reversal, XXXX of my legitimate {$1000.00} payments is now missing from my account. 

I have contacted the company, and they stated they did not find anything wrong, but they have not provided documentation showing how the {$10000.00} reversal was applied or how both original {$1000.00} payments were accounted for. 

Based on my records, XXXX valid {$1000.00} money order payment has not been properly credited to my account. 

I am requesting a full transaction investigation, including : The transaction ID for the {$10000.00} credit The transaction ID for the {$10000.00} reversal A breakdown showing which specific payments were reversed Correction of my account to reflect the missing {$1000.00} payment I have attached copies of my XXXX money order receipts and payment history as supporting documentation. 

I am requesting that this matter be fully investigated and corrected.
